name: Ron Kittle
transactions: July 5, 1977:Signed by theLos Angeles Dodgersas an amateur free agent.
September 4, 1978:Signed as a Free Agent with theChicago White Sox.

July 30, 1986:Traded by theChicago White SoxwithJoel SkinnerandWayne Tollesonto theNew York Yankeesfor a player to be named later,Ron HasseyandCarlos Martínez. TheNew York YankeessentBill Lindsey(December 24, 1986) to theChicago White Soxto complete the trade.
February 9, 1988:Signed as a Free Agent with theCleveland Indians.
November 26, 1988:Signed as a Free Agent with theChicago White Sox.
July 30, 1990:Traded by theChicago White Soxto theBaltimore OriolesforPhil Bradley.
January 20, 1991:Signed as a Free Agent with theCleveland Indians.
June 19, 1991:Signed as a Free Agent with theChicago White Sox.
